title: Internationalization Handling
content:
# Internationalization Handling

Kecare supports AI automatic translation, enabling articles to reach multilingual readers.

## Enable Translation

Add the `translate` field to the article's Front Matter:

```yaml
---
title: 我的第一篇文章
translate: ['zh-CN', 'en-US', 'ja-JP']
---
```

> The first language code must be the **original language** of the article.

## Configure Translation Service

Configure LLM in `.kecare/kecare.config.ts`:

```ts
export async function kecareConfig() {
    return {
        llm: {
            model: 'deepseek-chat',
            apiKey: 'your-api-key',
            apiBaseUrl: 'https://api.deepseek.com/v1',
            prompt: ''  // 可选：额外翻译提示词
        }
    };
}
```

Supports any service compatible with the OpenAI API format.

## Common Language Codes

| Language | Code |
|------|------|
| Simplified Chinese | `zh-CN` |
| English | `en-US` |
| Japanese | `ja-JP` |
| Korean | `ko-KR` |
| Traditional Chinese | `zh-TW` |

Language codes follow the BCP 47 standard: `language-region` (e.g., `en-GB`, `pt-BR`).

## Caching and Incremental Updates

The translation results are cached in the `.kecare/.tmp` directory, and only modified parts will be translated during the next build.

Clear Cache:

```bash
rm -rf .kecare/.tmp
```
